text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since we learned of Ms.
Kashimoto's past from Director Akikawa. One
night...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... When will you give up?!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... That's... my line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bitter Glasse and Little Cocon are facing off in a
heated partner running session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days earlier...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After learning about Ms. Kashimoto's past, Team
Zenith was at a total loss for what to do.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Having a racer injure herself mid-race like that
must've been traumatizing for Trainer
Kashimoto... I doubt she was able to take it well...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
No wonder she's so insistent about our nutritional
intake and making sure we don't get hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Team Zenith falls quiet, all of them lost in their
muddled thoughts. After a few moments of
silence...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
You know... I'm really grateful to Trainer
Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
My skills have improved because of her and my
body's gotten stronger. Looking at me now, no
one would believe I was just a child three years
ago.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I want to continue working under her guidance.
You guys feel the same, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite lingering uncertainty, the rest of Team
Zenith nod firmly at Little Cocon's question.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
The target time Trainer Kashimoto calculated for
me is 3 minutes 6.2 seconds...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
These three years I've spent chasing after that
goal have really come to shape me.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
And it's not only the Unity Cup that I've gotten
great results in, but the Twinkle Series too.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I've only been able to come so far thanks to
Trainer Kashimoto, and I want her to continue
teaching me and helping me grow.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: That's all I want, but... No, that's why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon raises her head with a determined
expression.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: That's why I—why we have to do better than she thinks we can.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: What're you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kashimoto set my target time for 3
minutes 6.2 seconds. That's the time I should
strive to get, and it's meant to be my final goal.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
But it also means she believes that's my limit and I
can't run any faster than that.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Ahh, I getcha! So what you're saying is—

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: We've got to eclipse her expectations entirely.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
If we can do that, we can tear down the
misguided beliefs she's held on to for so long!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks of passion ignite once more within the
sullen eyes of each team member.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you said it. Let's knock her socks off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They discuss their training plans going forward,
then call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I didn't think you were the type to want to
exceed someone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Well, after hearing about her past, I couldn't just
sit back and do nothing, could I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon turns her face away with a huff, but
Bitter Glasse doesn't avert her gaze.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Little Cocon? Something's been bothering
me since you said we should do this all together.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
You could have just disbanded the team and kept
Ms. Kashimoto all to yourself as your personal
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
It'd be a sweeter deal for you. Since you care so
much about getting stronger, I thought it'd be a
no-brainer.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: But you stopped yourself from saying "I have to have to do better" to say "we have to do better."

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: ...What's your point?

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Nothing, just that you surprised me. You've been
a loner since you entered Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
I thought you were like me and found it a waste
of time to make friends and whatever.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: My way of thinking has changed. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bitter Glasse relentlessly keeps up the pressure to
make her elaborate, and Little Cocon edges away
in discomfort.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
When I was a kid, I was part of a local running
team.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
One day, one of our teammates brought a sports
catalogue to practice.

text_block_list.name: Teammate A
text_block_list.text:
Look here! We could get matching shoes for
everyone! These ones are cute!

text_block_list.name: Teammate B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, nice idea! Those red shoes look super cool!
What do you all think?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was overjoyed at the idea of getting
matching shoes, but I didn't understand what the
point of it was.

text_block_list.name: Young Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Count me out.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
That one comment was enough to turn everyone
against me. Similar things kept happening, and
one day my trainer called me to talk.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Cocon, you're being too stubborn with your team.
You have to at least try to get along with
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I quit the team. I became the girl who
didn't know how to be a team player.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I was so against the idea of this whole
team competition.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Rankings based on team performance? Having to
play nice with everyone all the time? It wasn't for
me.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
But just as I was about to dismiss the whole idea,
Trainer Kashimoto called me in to see her.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
In my team, I will manage everyone's activities.
You won't need to worry about anyone apart
from yourself.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That's how professional teams work, after all.
Each member carries out their own role, without
needlessly meddling in each other's affairs.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I believe a team of similar nature would suit your
character.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I know she wasn't saying all that for my sake. I
know that.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
But even so, I was... happy. Glad to find out that
impersonal teams existed.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
When we began competing together, I even felt a
sense of responsibility for the team's success.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Being in this team has been... Well, it's new
territory for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon shifts her gaze downward. After a
moment of silence, Bitter Glasse speaks up.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: It's the same for me.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What is?

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: People always kept their distance from me because they found it freaky how I always get way too into my training.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
So this is like a completely new frontier for me
too. Heh, guess we're two peas in a pod!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bitter Glasse's laughter echoes out into the starry
night sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Cocon and Glasse
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Team Zenith continues training in line with the
regimen Ms. Kashimoto originally crafted for
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And upon finishing their base training, they
complete an additional three hours of hard
exercise!

text_block_list.name: Member A
text_block_list.text: This... might be a bit too much...

text_block_list.name: Member B
text_block_list.text:
Stop spacin' out! Watch the race and take
pointers!

text_block_list.name: Cocon and Glasse
text_block_list.text: I'm not losing to youuu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two racers pass the final corner, accelerate
together on the homestretch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And speed past the finish line, shoulder to
shoulder!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I was this close to outpacing you... How annoying!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Huff... Whew, haven't felt that fired up in a while!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: But, man, your lung capacity is the real deal...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did you say something?

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Nope, nothing at all! Anyway, trying to outrun
each other during pair running is pretty effective
training! Let's add it to future sessions too!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
"We will all be absent from training until the next
Unity Cup"...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Not only are they doing a group boycott, but
they're doing intense solo training too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The letter shakes in Ms. Kashimoto's trembling
hands.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
No... It's happening again... I'm nothing but a
failure of a trainer!
